title: Vacancy for Teacher at Udemy India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Udemy India
jsonLd.description:
Udemy India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Udemy India:
Udemy India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Udemy India!
